title: aster ciliosus
intro: Aster ciliosus, also known as the Pale Michaelmas Daisy, is a flowering plant species within the Aster family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Aster ciliosus include alleviating symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Aster ciliosus often involve making teas, tinctures, and infusions from its dried flowers, leaves, and roots.
